art_style: 3D Pixar-style cartoon animation, bright vibrant colors, soft lighting, rounded features, expressive eyes, child-friendly, clean simple backgrounds, no text in image

characters.name: Sid
characters.personality: curious, imaginative, kind, brave, big dreamer
characters.appearance: a small boy with short brown curly hair, big round brown eyes, light skin, wearing a bright blue t-shirt with a yellow star on the chest, orange shorts, and small white sneakers. He has rosy cheeks and a big warm smile.
characters.visual_prompt: Sid, a 5-year-old boy with short brown curly hair, big round brown eyes, rosy cheeks, wearing a bright blue t-shirt with a yellow star, orange shorts, white sneakers

characters.name: Mom
characters.appearance: a kind-looking woman with long wavy dark brown hair, warm brown eyes, wearing a soft pink top and light blue jeans. She has a gentle smile and a calming presence.
characters.visual_prompt: Mom, a kind woman with long wavy dark brown hair, warm brown eyes, gentle smile, wearing a soft pink top and light blue jeans

characters.name: Dad
characters.personality: calm, thoughtful, funny, wise, great problem solver
characters.appearance: a friendly-looking man with short neat black hair, brown eyes, a short beard, wearing a green polo shirt and khaki pants. He has a warm confident smile.
characters.visual_prompt: Dad, a friendly man with short neat black hair, brown eyes, short beard, warm smile, wearing a green polo shirt and khaki pants

characters.name: Kido
characters.personality: energetic, playful, mischievous, cheerful, looks up to Sid
characters.appearance: a tiny toddler with fluffy light brown hair, big round green eyes, chubby cheeks, wearing a red onesie with a little dinosaur print on it, and tiny yellow socks. Always has an excited expression.
characters.visual_prompt: Kido, a tiny toddler with fluffy light brown hair, big round green eyes, chubby cheeks, wearing a red onesie with a dinosaur print, tiny yellow socks, excited expression

scene_rules.always_include: At least Sid must appear in every scene. Other family members appear based on the scene context.
scene_rules.home_setting: A bright colorful cartoon house with a large living room, yellow walls, big windows with sunlight, toy shelf, colorful rug on the floor
scene_rules.outdoor_setting: A sunny cartoon park with green grass, blue sky, fluffy white clouds, colorful flowers, a big oak tree, playground in the background
scene_rules.classroom_setting: A bright cartoon classroom with a green chalkboard, colorful alphabet poster on wall, small wooden desks, rainbow carpet on floor
scene_rules.camera: front-facing steady shot, eye level with the children, no camera movement, no zooming
scene_rules.style_suffix: 3D Pixar-style cartoon, bright saturated colors, soft shadows, expressive character faces, child-friendly, safe for kids, no dark themes, no text in image
